feature: Enterprise Agent Platform Sprint 4: Personal assistant + Manus patterns

tasks.title: /morning-brief command — daily morning briefing
tasks.description: Create commands/morning-brief.md: aggregates calendar events, overnight pipeline results, task status, open PRs, learning ledger into a structured daily briefing. Supports Telegram delivery and cron scheduling.
acceptance_criteria: Command follows existing SKILL.md frontmatter pattern
Covers 6 data sources: calendar, overnight pipelines, tasks, PRs, learnings, priorities
Gracefully skips missing integrations with setup hints
Includes Telegram delivery section with 4096-char split
Includes recommended cron setup

tasks.title: /eod-summary command — end-of-day summary
tasks.description: Create commands/eod-summary.md: captures today's commits, task completions, PRs, blockers, and tomorrow's plan. Supports Telegram delivery and weekday cron.
acceptance_criteria: Command follows existing SKILL.md frontmatter pattern
Pulls work done from git log (single source of truth)
Identifies blockers from tasks.json, ghost-config, and PRs
Generates actionable tomorrow plan
Includes metrics snapshot
Supports Telegram delivery and weekday-only cron

tasks.title: /weekly-health command — cross-project health report
tasks.description: Create commands/weekly-health.md: discovers active projects, reports per-project status, aggregate metrics with week-over-week trends, health indicators with thresholds, and actionable recommendations.
acceptance_criteria: Command follows existing SKILL.md frontmatter pattern
Auto-discovers active projects via git activity
Shows per-project task progress and PR status
Includes week-over-week trend comparison
Health indicators with green/yellow/red thresholds
Ends with actionable recommendations

tasks.title: /pr-reminder command — PR nudge system
tasks.description: Create commands/pr-reminder.md: scans open PRs, classifies by staleness (fresh/normal/stale/critical), generates actionable summary with merge-ready and review-requested prioritization.
acceptance_criteria: Command follows existing SKILL.md frontmatter pattern
Fetches both authored and review-requested PRs via gh CLI
Classifies PRs by age: fresh/normal/stale/critical
Leads with actions, not just data
Includes PR health metrics
Supports --all-repos, --notify, --threshold flags

tasks.title: PROJECT_ANCHOR.md — attention anchoring system
tasks.description: Create PROJECT_ANCHOR.md implementing Manus attention anchoring pattern: agents re-read this file every task iteration to prevent goal drift. Includes integration points for auto-build, auto-ship, ghost-run.
acceptance_criteria: Documents the attention anchoring pattern with Manus source attribution
Defines re-read frequency for each pipeline command
Includes template sections: Current Goal, Key Constraints, Success Criteria, Non-Goals
Rules section enforces read-only during builds
Integration table maps commands to re-read checkpoints

tasks.title: agents/core/verifier.md — independent verifier agent
tasks.description: Create independent verifier agent following Manus 3-agent model. Accepts acceptance criteria + git diff, verifies independently without builder context. Checks criteria satisfaction, regressions, scope creep, structural patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Agent follows agents/core/*.md frontmatter pattern
Uses sonnet model tier (not opus — cost-efficient for verification)
Has NO access to builder context (intentional fresh perspective)
Verifies each acceptance criterion independently with PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL
Checks for regressions, scope creep, and structural violations
Output format includes programmatically parseable verdict line
Added to catalog.json in review and fullstack teams

tasks.title: HANDOVER.md — cross-session state preservation
tasks.description: Create HANDOVER.md implementing Manus file-based context management. Preserves sprint state, active work, decisions, and context across Claude Code sessions. Defines update protocol for /reflect, /eod-summary, /auto-ship.
acceptance_criteria: Documents cross-session state pattern with Manus source attribution
Includes sections: Current Sprint, Active Work, Key Decisions, Context for Next Session, Pipeline State
Defines writer commands (/reflect, /eod-summary, /auto-ship, /ghost-run)
Defines reader protocol (HANDOVER → tasks.json → PROJECT_ANCHOR → work)
Integration table shows relationship with other state files
Rules enforce currency and minimum-viable-context principles

tasks.title: Update AGENTS.md and catalog.json with Sprint 4 content
tasks.description: Add Sprint 4 sections to AGENTS.md (Personal Assistant Commands, Manus Agent Patterns). Add verifier agent to catalog.json. Update tasks.json to Sprint 4.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md has 'Personal Assistant Commands (Sprint 4)' section
AGENTS.md has 'Manus Agent Patterns (Sprint 4)' section
catalog.json includes verifier agent with correct teams
tasks.json updated to Sprint 4 feature with all 8 tasks completed
